title: Care to Share
description: Skip the annoying (& rude) item dropping and gift to your friends instead!
body:
# Care to Share
#### Tired of the tedious dance of dropping items on the ground for your friends to pick up? Say goodbye to the hassle! This addition to your Minecraft experience allows players to seamlessly share items with each other without cluttering the ground, creating more pleasant and friendly interactions.

# ✅ Features
- **Share items** by holding out your hand (default: ```G```) while having the stack selected in your hotbar
- **Take items** by interacting (default: ```Right Button```) with a player who's sharing


# 📖 Configuration
The keybind for holding out your hand (default: ```G```) can be changed in Minecraft's keybinds menu, under the 'Inventory' category.

# 📷 Visuals
![Zuri, a Minecraft character, sharing a Heart Pottery Sherd with Steve, a Minecraft character, from both first and third person](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/spMkRk1U/images/cc303db24bdf053c1547a126e0e85cc437d2a1e1.png)
